title: thelypteris × thwaitesii
intro: Thelypteris × thwaitesii is a hybrid fern species resulting from the cross between the two species of Thelypteris, a genus of ferns commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Thelypteris × thwaitesii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the reduction of swelling and the prevention of infection. Traditionally, herbal preparations of this plant have been made into infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
